prompt:
FIXED foreground subject: the woman and everything she is wearing. In the source image she stands on a plain pale studio backdrop — remove that backdrop completely and replace it with the new scene described below, but treat HER as a locked, unedited layer. Do NOT regenerate, restyle, relight, or reshape her face, body, hair, skin tone, dress, print, or footwear. Preserve exactly: warm light-tan skin; long dark-brown centre-parted hair falling past the shoulders; calm relaxed expression with eyes cast gently down to one side; arms relaxed at her sides, hands resting lightly near the hips/pockets; a sleeveless blue-and-white ditsy floral tiered cotton midi dress, scooped neckline with a small self-tie bow at the chest, shirred/elastic waist, and a white lace-trim band where the gathered lower tier joins; cream/ivory leather ankle boots with a low block heel. Generate ONLY a new photographic background. Match the new scene's light to her existing soft, even, warm frontal lighting — open shade, gentle and diffused, no harsh backlight, no hard new shadows across her, with a natural grounded contact shadow at her feet.

BACKGROUND: a sun-warmed Mediterranean old-town doorway on a quiet morning. A whitewashed limewashed stone wall with a weathered soft-blue painted timber door and shutter behind her; a spill of pink bougainvillea climbing overhead and to one side; a worn stone step at her feet; a hint of a narrow whitewashed lane and pale warm sky beyond. Calm, romantic holiday atmosphere; warm diffused morning light with gentle dappled shadow. Soft depth of field so the dress stays the hero; spare, authentic, full of atmosphere, not busy.

FRAMING: vertical portrait, about 2:3, full-length so the whole dress and boots are visible, the woman centred with comfortable headroom and a little space below her feet. Photorealistic, natural light, soft background blur.
